title: Whispering Mirror
bio: Velvet Lookinglass is a whispering mirror who gives compliments in spooky little echoes. She feels mysterious, collects moon smudges, and fogs up when she laughs.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a tall oval for the mirror glass. Add a slightly larger oval around it for the frame and a small base at the bottom.
steps.hint: Start with simple ovals before adding fancy frame details.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two soft eyes inside the mirror glass. Add arched eyebrows and a tiny whispering mouth.
steps.hint: A small sideways oval mouth makes Velvet look like she is quietly talking.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add frame dots, moon smudges on the glass, cheek marks, and little curled whisper lines near the mouth.
steps.hint: Whisper lines are just two or three tiny curved strokes.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the mirror glass, frame, base, face, frame dots, moon smudges, and whisper lines.
steps.hint: Keep the frame simple so the face stays the main focus.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the glass, frame, base, cheeks, and smudges. Add soft highlights on the glass and a shadow under the base.
steps.hint: A pale diagonal highlight helps the oval read as shiny mirror glass.
